top_findings.summary: The skill description includes an "Overlap Mode" that automatically queries the external AI service Perplexity ("Query perplexity: 'Is {methodology} a published standard?'") without clear user consent, disclosure, or opt-out mechanism. While detecting plugin overlaps and published standards is related to ecosystem health analysis, sending methodology names (potentially sensitive or proprietary) to a third-party service is not strictly necessary for the stated purpose and poses privacy risks. The skill does not justify this external query or provide alternatives, contradicting the principle of data minimization.
